/usr/sbin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/app/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/system/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/core/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/math/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/ui/Canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/FLACHEAD.dir/src/screens/HomeScreen.cpp.o -o FLACHEAD  /usr/lib64/libSDL3.so.0.4.12
